name: Wilcom Duncan
bio: Wilcom Duncan is a Liberian entrepreneur, SME Development Consultant, business trainer, speaker, and media executive working at the intersection of business development, executive education, corporate branding, and media strategy. Through platforms connected to Reecom Media, CEOs Chat, and CEOs Bootcamp, he helps entrepreneurs, founders, SMEs, and corporate teams think strategically, communicate clearly, and build businesses with structure, discipline, and long-term value.

expertiseAreas.title: SME Development
expertiseAreas.description: Helping small and medium-sized enterprises strengthen their structure, strategy, operations, and growth potential.

expertiseAreas.title: Business Development
expertiseAreas.description: Supporting entrepreneurs and organizations with practical ideas for growth, positioning, partnerships, and long-term value creation.

expertiseAreas.title: Corporate Branding
expertiseAreas.description: Guiding businesses on how to communicate their identity, improve visibility, and build brands that earn trust.

expertiseAreas.title: Business Communication
expertiseAreas.description: Training leaders and teams to communicate with clarity, professionalism, confidence, and purpose.

expertiseAreas.title: Executive Training
expertiseAreas.description: Creating learning experiences for CEOs, founders, managers, and emerging executives who want to lead with discipline and strategy.

expertiseAreas.title: Media Strategy
expertiseAreas.description: Using media platforms, storytelling, interviews, and public visibility to support business leadership and brand authority.
